response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience across multiple languages and domains, there is minimal evidence of deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, or enterprise framework (Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus) expertise required for this role; his Java exposure is listed only as a skill with no project depth, and his work centers on TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js — not IDE tooling or JVM internals.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Proven experience building developer tooling and open-source projects
Active contributor to educational content and community workshops
concerns: No demonstrated experience with Spring, Hibernate, or other enterprise Java frameworks
Lack of visible contributions to IDEs, language servers, or JVM tooling systems
Java is listed as a skill but not as a primary language in any role or project
